pages.title: Inscribed terrain
pages.text: 山 and 裂 use the inscription circle. Press $(l)V$(), choose a world position, then write the glyph to temporarily alter nearby terrain.$(br2)They roll back on expiry, death, logout, or destruction, so they do not permanently dirty the save.

pages.title: 山: temporary cover
pages.text: Position: raises a 5-block-wide wall. Direction follows the caster facing. Higher tiers increase height and add special behavior.

pages.title: 山 tiers
pages.text: Wood 5 long x 2 high stone wall/45s$(br)Stone 5x3/60s$(br)Copper 5x3, mossy/90s$(br)Iron 5x4/2m$(br)Gold 5x4, glowing/90s$(br)Diamond 5x5, thorned/3m$(br)Netherite 5x5, obsidian-styled, thorned/4m

pages.title: 裂: collapse trap
pages.text: Position: collapses ground to disturb standing position and pathing. It triggers 1 second after writing so you can step away. Falling in deals 1 heart of fall damage.

pages.title: 裂 tiers
pages.text: Wood 3x3, 2 deep/30s$(br)Stone 3x3, irregular rim/45s$(br)Copper 3x3, ink stain bottom/60s$(br)Iron 3x3, rift particles/90s$(br)Gold 5x5, shallow rim/75s$(br)Diamond 5x5, ink smoke/2m$(br)Netherite 5x5, ink smoke, slowing rim/3m

pages.title: Protection rules
pages.text: 山 and 裂 do not overwrite containers, redstone cores, portals, bedrock, obsidian, command blocks, or other critical blocks.$(br2)If the target area is unsafe, the glyph fails with a message.
